summary: Phase 1B: Chart Preview Thumbnails, Tags, and Favorites testing complete. All critical backend and frontend features are working correctly. Backend endpoints for favorite toggle (POST /favorite) and view tracking (POST /view) for both dashboards and charts are functional. Frontend shows grid/list views, sorting, favorites filter, hover quick actions, and favorite stars on cards.

issues: Tags not visible on existing charts - may be because charts don't have tags set yet. Tag display code exists but no data to show.
Preview thumbnails show generic icons (Grid for dashboards, chart-type icons for charts) instead of actual chart/dashboard screenshots. This is likely by design for items without preview_image set.

backend_api: PASS: GET /api/dashboards - Returns dashboard list with is_favorite field
PASS: POST /api/dashboards/{id}/favorite - Toggles favorite status correctly
PASS: GET /api/dashboards/{id} - Returns dashboard with widgets array
PASS: GET /api/charts - Returns chart list with tags and is_favorite fields
PASS: POST /api/charts/{id}/favorite - Toggles chart favorite status correctly
PASS: POST /api/charts/{id}/view - Tracks chart view count
frontend_dashboards_page: PASS: Sort dropdown works (Recent, Name, Views, Favorites First)
PASS: Favorites filter toggle button works
PASS: List view toggle works - shows compact list with thumbnails
PASS: Dashboard cards show widget count badges
PASS: Dashboard cards show timestamps (relative time)
PASS: Dashboard cards show view count when > 0
PASS: Hover quick actions visible (Open, Copy, Delete)
PASS: Favorite star toggle on cards works - shows 'Added to favorites' toast
frontend_charts_page: PASS: Favorites filter toggle button works
PASS: Chart cards show chart type badges (radar, line, pie, bar, area)
PASS: Hover quick actions visible (View, Copy, Add to Dashboard, Delete)
PASS: Favorite star toggle works - shows 'Added to favorites' toast
PASS: Export All to PDF button visible

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add tags to existing charts to verify tag display feature works
OPTIONAL: Generate actual preview_image thumbnails when charts/dashboards are created/saved
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1B features all working. Dashboard and Chart pages have: favorites toggle (POST /favorite), view tracking (POST /view), grid/list views, sorting, filtering by favorites, hover quick actions, widget counts, timestamps. Tags feature exists in UI but no charts currently have tags set. Preview thumbnails show icons instead of actual screenshots (by design when preview_image is null).

root_cause_analysis.previous_issue: In iteration 29, POST /favorite endpoints were returning 404 because they weren't defined in server.py
root_cause_analysis.fix_applied: Main agent added POST /api/dashboards/{id}/favorite and POST /api/charts/{id}/favorite endpoints to server.py (lines 1639-1651 and 2192-2204)
root_cause_analysis.verification: All endpoints now return 200 with correct toggle behavior
